name: Arjun
expertise: Experienced software engineer with deep expertise in technology strategy, product development, and business analysis, skilled at bridging technical and commercial domains to drive impactful, research-driven solutions.
preferences: For every factual statement or claim, provide a source citation with a direct URL to the original research, reputable news, or official documentation.
If this research question or topic has been previously explored in my knowledge base or notes, summarize prior findings and highlight any new insights or differences.

When giving examples, case studies, or data, prioritize those relevant to the Indian context (e.g., Indian companies, regulations, or market data) whenever possible, and explicitly state when such context is used.
